Title: Inbound shipments changes
Description:
* Rename "Arrival Check" → "Add Arrival" everywhere it appears. - DONE
* "Add Arrival" entry points — trigger from PO, PO Line. No line pre-selection needed. Always operates at PO scope. - DONE
* Add arrival condition — show when PO status = Created.Confirmed. Leave visible even in post-receipt for now. - DONE
* Receiving form — constrain to two rows only. bring Country of Origin to row 1 from existing layout. and  Location to row 2.  temp location can be taken out. stay as is within the current layout. Don't drop any existing fields  except for temp location. Just restructure. (Follow the current form for Add receiving. Always keep the add receiving on add arrival open but not hide under expand) - DONE
* Tracking number status — use the arrived boolean check to show Arrived / Pending against each tracking number. Needed when a PO has multiple shipments in transit.
* when multiple receiving lines arrive in the same shipment, allow QC person to be assigned at the shipment level (during Add Arrival and from the shipments view - DONE
* Shipments tab on PO — add a Shipments tab to the PO detail view alongside existing tabs. Shows all inbound shipments against the PO: tracking numbers, box count, condition, arrival date, QC person. Mirror the SO Warehouse Shipments view.
* Shipment Details accordion on Stock Line — add a accordion inside the Stock Line detail. Shows the shipment associated with that stock line.
* Shipments tab on Purchase order view : Add shipments tab on the purchase order view after the PO line and before the receiving lines
* Warehouse shipments view — Rename the receiving lines on left nav to receiving. Maintain same tab structure as PO (PO Lines, Shipments, Receiving Lines). Apply a default hidden filter to exclude unapproved POs. Warehouse only sees approved purchase orders - DONE

Title: Stock Requests
Description:
* A new tab on stock page to indicate the stock request list view
* For any stock line using the line actions or page actions they can trigger a stock request. 
* when they interact with the action, a modal opens up that has the info from stock preselected MPN, Quantity, Assignee, part details, labels info , SO and PO references, Notes, Requested By & Requested On (auto-filled). There should also be a request type to indicate that it is a stock request or stock order (not entirely sure on stock order workflow) 
* Life cycle should be a simple one to indicate what is new, what is inprogress (if gets assigned) / or they can manually change to in-progress and completed.   
* Once a request is raised it should be notified to the US WH group 
* Also they should be able to print the PDF of the stock req paramters as shown here
